summary: Frontend-only regression for iteration 2. All 6 reported bug fixes verified on preview URL: ticker removed, Archivo Black bold sans-serif font applied, content centred (flex column, align-items:center, text-align:center), body background solid rgb(5,5,5) with no .ambient/.orb/.grain/.vignette elements in DOM, percent rendered as whole number via Math.floor (56% for start=2024-01-01, target=2028-06-15, no decimal), and quotes served from motivating/warrior list (verified Tony Robbins served, no self-help authors like Marcus Aurelius/Seneca/Buddha detected in quote source or output). Regression: first-run submits to dashboard, settings modal opens with correct data-testid, saves and closes correctly, localStorage state persists across reload, zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx line 15 already applies Math.floor to c.percent for display but progress-fill width still uses raw c.percent — harmless but inconsistent; could floor for uniformity.
SettingsModal save-button testid is 'save-settings-button' (not 'settings-save' as hinted in some contexts) — worth confirming naming consistency in future tests.
seed_data_creation: Set localStorage keys (rdc:state, remainingDays:state, remaining-days-state, countdown-state) with {targetDate:'2028-06-15', startDate:'2024-01-01', label:'Test Horizon'} to force controlled percent verification -> resolved to 56%.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Correct storage key discovered: 'remainingDays:state'. First-run form only exposes target date (data-testid=first-run-target-input) + submit (first-run-submit). To fully control start date and label use Settings modal with testids settings-target-input, settings-start-input, settings-label-input, save-settings-button, close-settings-button, reset-button. Dashboard testids: dashboard-screen, brand-label, target-label, days-remaining, percent-value, progress-fill, stat-meta, daily-quote, settings-button. Auto-accept dialogs for Reset (window.confirm).
